name: The Pearl
address: 180 High Park Lane, Silver Spring, MD 20910
approxRentRange: $2,900-$4,472/month for 2BR (Rentable.co mid-2026; RentCafe shows $3,172-$3,741; starting prices vary by source and availability)
bathroomsNote: 2BR floor plans carry 2 full baths per multiple listing sources. 1BR units are 1 bath. 3BR units are also 2 baths. Units feature quartz countertops and modern finishes.

notes.doormanDetail: Patch.com 2017 announcement explicitly states '24-hour full-service concierge.' RentCafe listing states '24-hour concierge service.' Multiple resident reviews on ApartmentRatings name specific overnight concierge staff by name and describe them as always present. Rated Confirmed 24h.
notes.building: LEED-certified luxury high-rise, 14 stories, 284 units, built 2017 by The Tower Companies. First Fitwel-certified multifamily building in the world. Located in The Blairs District of downtown Silver Spring, approximately 0.4 miles from Silver Spring Metro (Red Line).
notes.amenities: Aquaterra rooftop saltwater pool with cabanas; two-story fitness center with free weekly classes; wellness kitchen; WorkLab WiFi co-working lounge; on-site urban farm; dog park and pet spa; EV charging; package lockers; reservable guest suite; valet dry cleaning; bike room; controlled access.
notes.balconyDetail: Private balconies available on select units in multiple configurations: standard, long, double, and penthouse double. Not every unit includes a balcony; depends on specific floor plan and unit selection.
notes.has2BRor1BRDenDetail: 2BR floor plans confirmed (Hawthorn and Olympia plans; 957-1,203 sq ft). '1 bedroom plus den' is explicitly named as a floor plan type in the Tower Companies' 2017 Patch announcement. Den plan not currently featured by name on the leasing site; contact leasing to confirm current availability.
notes.inUnitLaundryDetail: In-unit washer/dryer confirmed across multiple listing sources and resident reviews. Residents specifically cite it as a selling point. All units appear to include washer/dryer (not connections only per VeryApt listing; one listing on Rentable noted 'connections only,' but resident reviews confirm full in-unit units).
notes.unitClimateDetail: Air conditioning confirmed as a unit feature per resident reviews. Nest thermostats explicitly mentioned for penthouse units only in Tower Companies marketing. Whether standard units have individual thermostats or are on a building-wide chilled-water system is not confirmed in available sources. Marked Unclear; verify with leasing before signing.
notes.petDetail: Cats and dogs welcome. Up to 2 pets per home. Weight limit approximately 100 lbs. Breed restrictions apply (Pit Bulls, Rottweilers, Huskies, and others listed). Pet deposit and monthly pet rent apply. Dog park and pet grooming station on-site.
notes.wellMaintainedDetail: Rated 4.5 out of 5 across 202 resident reviews (ApartmentRatings). Reviewers consistently describe professional staff, responsive 24-hour emergency maintenance, and a well-kept building. Main complaint in reviews is power outages during storms.
notes.phoneNote: Primary phone from liveatthepearl.com and search results is (301) 587-3275. Secondary number (681) 246-0832 appears on Rentable.co and may be a leasing-line variant.
notes.photoNote: Photo URL is from Interim Homes property page (third-party furnished housing operator); it shows the building exterior as of 2020. The official photo gallery is at liveatthepearl.com/photogallery but the site blocks scraping.
